response.original_title: Why did Kraken restrict my account?{{24 Hour line}
response.overview: ☎️+1-830-745-0056  This is one of the most common questions users ask when facing issues with their crypto funds, and understanding the reasons behind it is essential. ☎️+1-830-745-0056  Often, transfer restrictions happen due to security measures, verification delays, or account limitations that  imposes to protect users. ☎️+1-830-745-0056  If your account is new or recently updated, withdrawals and transfers may be temporarily restricted until full verification is completed. ☎️+☎️1-830-745-0056  In such cases, ☎️+☎️1-830-745-0056  checking your KYC status and ensuring all documents are approved can resolve the issue quickly. ☎️+1-830-745-0056
response.title: Why did Kraken restrict my account?{{24 Hour line}
